mei.relationship: Same mansion, same frequency — no external forces at play
mei.daily_feel: Comfortable and familiar, low adaptation cost
mei.energy_flow_desc: Bidirectional, balanced — neither party drains the other
mei.long_term_risk: Too comfortable may lead to stagnation
mei.growth: Low. Must find your own growth motivation
mei.bad_year_impact: Bad years don't add extra drain from the company
mei.fit_for: Self-disciplined individuals who create their own drive

gyo.relationship: Past-life karma drives a natural sense of mission
gyo.daily_feel: An inexplicable sense of duty, naturally invested
gyo.energy_flow_desc: Slight output, but karmic support prevents exhaustion
gyo.long_term_risk: May over-invest and neglect personal needs
gyo.bad_year_impact: Mission feels heavier but won't collapse

tai.relationship: Karmic receiver — the other party naturally supports you
tai.daily_feel: Feeling cared for, quick to settle in
tai.energy_flow_desc: Other party provides slight output, you receive

ei.relationship: Mutual resource investment creating a positive cycle
ei.energy_flow_desc: Active investment but reciprocation prevents fatigue
ei.bad_year_impact: Cycle may weaken but won't reverse into drain

shin.relationship: The other party invests in your growth
shin.daily_feel: Valued and nurtured, someone champions you
shin.energy_flow_desc: Other party actively invests, you benefit
shin.bad_year_impact: Investment effect weakens but doesn't reverse

yu.relationship: You're the giver, company gets comfort from you
yu.daily_feel: You drive the relationship, fatigue goes unnoticed
yu.long_term_risk: Good for social layer only, not deep commitment
yu.bad_year_impact: Social energy drops, giving becomes harder
yu.fit_for: Strong social skills, enjoys relationship building

sui.relationship: You're the sui party, continuously drained
sui.daily_feel: Resources come in but fatigue accumulates
sui.energy_flow_desc: Company invests heavily, your returns diminish over time
sui.long_term_risk: Drained to the point of wanting to leave but unable to
sui.fit_for: High stress tolerance with a clear exit timeline

an.relationship: You lead stability but must continuously output energy
an.daily_feel: Like holding an umbrella — you stabilize, they depend

kai.relationship: Other party continuously extracts your energy
kai.daily_feel: Subtle at first, after 6 months nothing feels enough
kai.fit_for: Only with strong external support (mentor, side income)

ki.energy_flow_desc: Other party applies pressure, you absorb
ki.long_term_risk: Pressure has limits — beyond that, it becomes harm
ki.bad_year_impact: Pressure may crush rather than push

sei.relationship: Growth through friction, stronger after adjustment
sei.daily_feel: Uncomfortable initially, then realize you've grown
sei.energy_flow_desc: Other party's traits refine you, low drain
sei.fit_for: Those who tolerate initial discomfort for long-term gain
